name: Chicken/Rice/Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Crisco oil with roasted garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli and rice separately. Set aside.
2. In a large pot, melt butter and add oil, pepper, and garlic salt.
3. Saute onions, mushrooms, and celery until tender but not brown.
4. Mix soups together and add to the onion/celery/mushroom mixture.
5. Add 1/2 can of milk.
6. Add cheese and mix well.
7. Add rice and broccoli and mix well.
8. Sprinkle chicken on top.
9. Cover; bake at 350°F for about 1 hour or until chicken is done.
